rationale: Elec. Code §253.005 governs political expenditures from unlawful contributions. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: A person may not knowingly make or authorize a political expenditure wholly or partly from a political contribution the person knows to have been made in violation of this chapter.
_note: Rule text concerns election law campaign finance; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
